title: Hostel Facilities at nominal rates
content: Recognizing the challenges faced by students, Galgotias University has implemented a hostel facility at nominal rates to ensure that accommodation costs are not a barrier to pursuing higher education. The primary goal is to create an inclusive environment that supports students from diverse economic backgrounds. The hostel facilities at nominal rates at our University stand as a testament to the institution's commitment to supporting students' holistic well-being. By providing affordable and quality accommodation options, University ensures that financial constraints do not hinder students' access to a safe and comfortable living environment during their academic journey.
